scope.summary: The server-owned OraclePool validates idle sessions before checkout and discards every final failed pooled call instead of returning it to idle reuse.
out_of_scope: Pinned dispatcher-session recycle/reconnect; that is A4e.
Installed service or HTTP pooled-client matrix proof; this close uses the DB crate live pooled lane.

entry_points.name: OraclePool checkout
entry_points.trace: OraclePool::try_checkout validates every idle RustOracleConnection with manager.is_valid before returning it; failed validation discards the slot and loops to open or select a fresh session.

entry_points.name: OraclePool return path
entry_points.trace: OraclePool::with_conn now discards every final Err result and only returns successful calls to idle after manager.has_broken ping succeeds; cancelled and failed calls cannot re-enter idle reuse.

entry_points.name: cargo fmt --all -- --check
entry_points.trace: Passed after the A4a pool hardening change.

entry_points.name: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target cargo test -p oraclemcp-db pool --lib
entry_points.trace: Passed 23 focused pool-related unit tests, including every_final_failure_discards_checked_out_connection and dirty_discard_no_pool_return.

entry_points.name: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target cargo check -p oraclemcp-db
entry_points.trace: Passed after the A4a pool hardening change.

entry_points.name: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target cargo test -p oraclemcp-db --features live-xe --test live_idle_kill -- --nocapture
entry_points.trace: Passed against rust-oracledb-free/FREEPDB1; the one-connection pool replaced killed idle session 233,48817 with 233,22981 without surfacing the death to the caller.

limitations: This closes the server-owned stateless pool surface only; the pinned field path remains A4e.
The live proof uses the existing synthetic Free23 container and DB crate lane, not an installed service run.
The full workspace gate was not run because this shared checkout has unrelated in-flight panes.
